summary: First test run completed. Backend auth endpoints working correctly. Frontend loads and all core features tested successfully including the CORE FEATURE (multi-restaurant cart grouping). Tab navigation, search, category filtering, and cart functionality all working as expected.

issues: Image resizeMode deprecation warnings - should use props.resizeMode instead of style.resizeMode
shadow* style props deprecated - should use boxShadow instead
AsyncStorage package version mismatch: @react-native-async-storage/async-storage@3.0.2 installed, expected 2.2.0

react_native_issues.issue: useNativeDriver warnings on web (expected behavior, not a bug)

action_items: Update Image components to use props.resizeMode instead of style.resizeMode
Replace shadow* style props with boxShadow for better compatibility
Consider downgrading @react-native-async-storage/async-storage to 2.2.0 or update expo version
critical_code_review_comments: All React Native components properly used (View, Text, TouchableOpacity, etc.)
All interactive elements have testID attributes for testing
Cart grouping logic correctly implemented in CartContext
Auth flow properly implemented with session token in cookie and localStorage
Environment variables correctly used for API URLs
No hardcoded URLs or credentials found
MongoDB ObjectId properly excluded from API responses
seed_data_creation: Test user (test-user-feast123) and session (test_session_feast_1777324392665) created in MongoDB for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All core features working. The CORE FEATURE (multi-restaurant cart grouping) is properly implemented and tested. Auth flow works with session tokens. Only minor deprecation warnings need to be addressed. Test credentials: session_token=test_session_feast_1777324392665, user_id=test-user-feast123

frontend: Login screen with Google Auth button
Home screen with search, categories, featured restaurants, nearby restaurants
Restaurant detail screen with menu items
Multi-restaurant cart (CORE FEATURE) - items grouped by restaurant
Place Order navigation to order confirmation
Profile screen with user info and logout button

core_feature_status.feature: Multi-restaurant cart with items grouped by restaurant
core_feature_status.details: Cart correctly groups items by restaurant. Each restaurant group shows restaurant name, delivery fee, items with quantity controls, and group subtotal. Total calculation includes all items and delivery fees from all restaurants.
